reviews.review_msg: Really clear and helpful with an boring subject. Always encouraged and answered questions.  Way too many assignments to hand in, however these did prepare me for the take home exams.  Exams were difficult and tricky but all the answers were found in the textbook or readings.

she's knowledgeable and enthusiastic. The class appears to be tough probably because she's new to the school, and does not know what SFU students have learned during the past three years. Way too many requirements for assignment submission. Midterms are hard and not helpful in office hour. She needs to take some education courses prior teaching
